title: taraxacum leptophyllum
intro: Taraxacum leptophyllum, also known as the lesser dandelion or slender dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum leptophyllum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to support liver function and promote overall well-being.
